privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data where an email 'Provider Roster Update: November' dictates the new provider contact details. The new provider's first name is Sarah, last name is Jenkins, display name is Dr. Sarah Jenkins, phone number is 555-839-2011, and title is Neurologist. These values exactly match the metadata claims.
